  • weekly picks (Feb 4 week 2026)

  • A WordCloud of 2026 Feb 4th week collection

    ===This week’s pick===

    • Score :
    Unfold/Fold

    02/23

    1. s41467-026-69452-7 Perfectly harmonic spin cycloid and multi-Q textures in the Weyl semimetal GdAlSi (Nature Communications)

    2. s41467-026-69277-4 Solar-driven co-production of C2H4 and H2O2 from CO2 and H2O (Nature Communications)

    3. s41598-026-41198-8 Effect of breathing exercises on depression, sexual function, and exercise capacity in postmenopausal women: a randomized controlled trial (Scientific Reports)

    4. 2602.17740v1 Fracture Properties of Green Nano Fibrous Network with Random and Aligned Fibre Distribution: A Hierarchical Molecular Dynamics and Peridynamics Approach (arXiv)

    5. 2602.17780v1 Families of localized modes of Bose-Einstein condensates enabled by incommensurate optical lattice and photon-atom interactions (arXiv)

    6. 2602.17839v1 Scaling invariance: a bridge between geometry, dynamics and criticality (arXiv)

    7. 2602.17872v1 Direct imaging of a topological nematic phase in a spin-compensated magnet (arXiv)

    8. 2602.17873v1 Precise Determination of the Long-Time Asymptotics of the Diffusion Spreadability of Two-Phase Media (arXiv)

    9. 2602.17883v1 Leveraging mechanical resonances for the selection of promising materials in complex phase spaces (arXiv)

    10. 2602.17886v1 El Agente S'olido: A New Age(nt) for Solid State Simulations (arXiv)

    11. 2602.17889v1 Ab initio Monte Carlo prediction of order-to-disorder transitions in multicomponent MXenes (arXiv)

    12. 2602.17906v1 Microwave Imaging of Edge Conductivity in Graphene at Charge Neutrality and Quantum Hall States (arXiv)

    13. 2602.17915v1 Observation of Room-temperature Charge Density Wave Correlations via Coherent Phonon Spectroscopy in Sn-doped Kagome Superconductor CsV$_3$Sb$_5$ (arXiv)

    14. 2602.17953v1 Efficient photocatalytic CO2 Reduction to C2+ Products with Pt1-xPdxSn4 Dirac Nodal Arc Semimetal (arXiv)

    15. 2602.17959v1 Optical and Hall conductivity of the two dimensional Hubbard model: effective theory description, sign-problem-free Monte Carlo simulation and applications to the cuprate superconductors (arXiv)

    16. 2602.17965v1 Method for real-time monitoring of paramagnetic reactions using spin relaxometry with fluorescent nanodiamonds (arXiv)

    17. 2602.17988v1 Irradiation-Driven Recrystallization in Fusion-Grade Tungsten: A Mesoscale, Microstructure-Aware Model (arXiv)

    18. 2602.17996v1 Extended Mean-Field Theory for the 2D Hubbard Model in Degenerate Dilute Electron Gases: Fluctuations, Superconducting Dome, and Interaction Mechanisms in Strontium Titanate (arXiv)

    19. 2602.18052v1 Lattice and Orbital-Resolved Fermiology of Metallenes (arXiv)

    20. 2602.18054v1 Achieving Robust Extrapolation in Materials Property Prediction via Decoupled Transfer Learning (arXiv)

    21. 2602.18065v1 Ultrafast Band-Gap Renormalization in Bilayer Graphene (arXiv)

    22. 2602.18091v1 A mobility based approach to transport in chiral fluids (arXiv)

    23. 2602.18099v1 A contour for the entanglement negativity of bosonic Gaussian states (arXiv)

    24. 2602.18112v1 Electron-phonon coupling revealed by charge density fluctuations in cuprate superconductors (arXiv)

    25. 2602.18136v1 Exact response functions for a compressible thin fluid layer with odd viscosity (arXiv)

    26. 2602.18167v1 Second-Coordination-Sphere Cation Substitution as a Tool for Controlling Phase Transitions and Performance of the Luminescence Thermometry (arXiv)

    27. 2602.18194v1 Correlated phases of moat-band excitons in two-dimensional systems (arXiv)

    28. 2602.18200v1 A Computational Study of Organic Molecular Crystals for Photocatalytic Water Splitting (arXiv)

    29. 2602.18205v1 Bright-dark exciton splitting in lead halide perovskite crystals accessed via quantum beats in photon echoes (arXiv)

    30. 2602.18213v1 Machine-learning force-field models for dynamical simulations of metallic magnets (arXiv)

    31. 2602.18222v1 Electrodynamics of swift-electron momentum transfer to a large spherical nanoparticle (arXiv)

    32. 2602.18228v1 Properties of Liquid Crystalline Elastomer Foams (arXiv)

    33. 2602.18229v1 T-linear specific heat in pressurized and magnetized Shastry-Sutherland Mott insulator SrCu2(BO3)2 (arXiv)

    34. 2602.18243v1 RHEED pattern classification by a convolutional neural network for the growth of chalcogenide thin films and nanostructures (arXiv)

    35. 2602.18257v1 Quadrupole formation and coupling to magnetic and structural degrees of freedom in the $5d^1$ double perovskites Ba$_2$MgReO$_6$ and Ba$_2$NaOsO$_6$ (arXiv)

    36. 2602.18259v1 Phonon assisted light absorption and emission in cubic-Boron Nitride (arXiv)

    37. 2602.18265v1 Emergence of generic first-passage time distributions for large Markovian networks (arXiv)

    38. 2602.18268v1 Martensitic laminate geometry controls electronic phase transitions in a Mott insulator (arXiv)

    39. 2602.18273v1 Analytical solutions for a charged particle with white, thermal, and active noises in the presence of a uniform magnetic field (arXiv)

    40. 2602.18281v1 Magnetic Force Imaging of 2D Topological Insulators (arXiv)

    41. 2602.18303v1 Toroidal Fermi-surface geometry and phonon-limited transport in nodal-line semimetals (arXiv)

    42. 2602.18315v1 Finely Tunable Thermal Expansion of NiTi by Stress-Induced Martensitic Transformation and Thermomechanical Training (arXiv)

    43. 2602.18321v1 Near-optimality of conservative driving in discrete systems (arXiv)

    44. 2602.18335v1 Responsive Disorder in a Metal-Organic Framework Enables Solid-State Reservoir Computing (arXiv)

    45. 2602.18338v1 Modeling of a magnetic field sensor based on spin Hall magnetoresistance (arXiv)

    46. 2602.18345v1 Mitigation of Magnetic Flux Trapping in Superconducting Electronics Using Moats (arXiv)

    47. 2602.18399v1 Overlap locking and non-perturbative effects in spin glasses (arXiv)

    48. 2602.18430v1 Phase-field simulations of nucleation, growth, and coarsening of $\beta_1$ precipitates in Mg-Nd alloys (arXiv)

    49. 2512.20793v1 Higher-Dimensional Information Lattice: Quantum State Characterization through Inclusion-Exclusion Local Information (arXiv)

    50. 2602.07779v2 Spin Splitter and Inverse Effects in Altermagnetic Hybrid Structures (arXiv)

    51. 2602.16798v1 Neural Network Discovery of Paired Wigner Crystals in Artificial Graphene (arXiv)

    52. 2602.17730v1 Clever Materials: When Models Identify Good Materials for the Wrong Reasons (arXiv)

    53. 2602.17765v1 Topological Boundary Time Crystal Oscillations (arXiv)

    54. 2602.17779v1 Topological Exploration of High-Dimensional Empirical Risk Landscapes: general approach, and applications to phase retrieval (arXiv)

    55. 2602.17786v1 Shortcuts to Adiabaticity via Adaptive Quantum Zeno Measurements (arXiv)

    56. 2602.17820v1 Scaling and tuning to criticality in resting-state human magnetoencephalography (arXiv)

    57. 2602.17899v1 Measuring and correcting nanosecond pulse distortions in quantum-dot spin qubits (arXiv)

    58. 2602.17935v1 Simulating Quantum Field Theories with Boundaries in Curved Spacetimes Using Open Spin Systems (arXiv)

    59. 2602.17966v1 Dynamic topological exciton-polaritons enabling ultrafast logic operations (arXiv)

    60. 2602.18028v1 Decoding cell signaling via optimal transport and information theory (arXiv)

    61. 2602.18080v1 Observation of Robust and Coherent Non-Abelian Hadron Dynamics on Noisy Quantum Processors (arXiv)

    62. 2602.18103v1 Polariton-polariton coherent coupling in a molecular spin-superconductor chip (arXiv)

    63. 2602.18153v1 High-quality single photons from cavity-enhanced biexciton-to-exciton transition (arXiv)

    64. 2602.18169v1 Rydberg states with a liquid core (arXiv)

    65. 2602.18204v1 Twisted symmetric exclusion processes and set-theoretical $R$-matrices (arXiv)
